title: atractylis carduus var. glabrescens
intro: Atractylis carduus var. glabrescens is a lesser-known variety of the Atractylis carduus plant, a species of thistle native to Asia and Europe. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and diuretic effects. The health benefits of Atractylis carduus var. glabrescens include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and relieve respiratory problems, making it a sought-after herb in traditional medicine. Atractylis carduus var. glabrescens is often prepared as a decoction or infusion for its herbal remedies.
